title: Law Faces Doflamingo Again
description: Pages 13–17 focus on law faces doflamingo again, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as bellamy forces Luffy into an emotional fight, while Law and Doflamingo prepare for the decisive clash.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even if I die, if I can take you with me...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I stand a chance of actually being remembered by Doflamingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What's the point in risking your life for a piece of scum like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't you think he's well aware of the fact...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: that you are right here killing yourself trying to beat me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If I can only get him to acknowledge- ledge me in death,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Then so be it! It'll still be just as sweet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You liar! It's not like this is the only way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: If you know what that word means, shut your mouth and fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: But you're gonna die for nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: And I'll have it, even if it means letting the only man I've ever respected lead me to my grave!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: If you've no intention of taking me up on my fight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I'll kill you where you stand!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: If you still know how to throw a punch, that is!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Thank you! Thank you... for calling me a friend...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: And I know...I know I picked the wrong guy to look up to!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Come, bring your pitiful self up here.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: He's in for a rude awakening, isn't he, law...

summary: Law Faces Doflamingo Again advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
